name: debounce (from lodash)
description: A source-faithful extracted bundle of lodash's debounce method and its required helpers, cut from the full lodash package instead of the standalone lodash.debounce package.
tagline: Extract lodash debounce from the monolith with helpers included.
summary: This page ships an extracted bundle from the full lodash package. The point is not to use the modular lodash.debounce package, but to prove that a monolithic package can be cut down to one vendorable timing behavior plus its helper chain.
nativeAlternative: setTimeout and clearTimeout get you part of the way, but they do not give you the same contract around leading or trailing calls, maxWait, cancel, flush, argument retention, and this binding.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization after extraction. The extraction defines the raw bundle; normalization only changes the packaging shape.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Source-faithful extracted bundle from the lodash package, with local helper modules inlined and module boundaries removed.

note: This snippet is a heavier monolith extraction experiment. It differs from the modular lodash.debounce package because the raw source is assembled from the full lodash package's internal module graph.
